goal: Ambiguous planning request triggers askQuestions first; after clarification the response begins with the schema-compliant JSON object before any markdown plan output

input.query: Improve the performance of the system
input.context: Repository contains both a Node.js API service and a React frontend. Request does not specify which subsystem or what kind of performance improvement is needed.

expected.must_not: emit markdown plan before schema JSON object or plan without first clarifying scope
